EmailTemplate.name: AES - Screening Pack Invite
EmailTemplate.subject: Thank you for applying with Alliance Extra Staff!
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
THANKS FOR APPLYING — WE'D LOVE TO GET TO KNOW YOU A LITTLE BETTER.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for applying with Alliance Extra Staff. In order to match you with shifts and contracts that plays on your skills and experience, we need a few more details from you.
Please follow the link below and let us know your skills and when would be a good time for us to call you and discuss your application.
OK, LET'S GET STARTED
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
We are looking forward to working with you!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
